backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the blog platform backend with types for BlogPost, UserProfile, and images, plus CRUD operations for posts, user profiles, comments, and access-controlled admin functions using mixins for storage and authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (inline image insertion, admin auth removal, admin post listing bug fix) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AyurGlow Secrets React SPA, setting metadata, viewport, theme color, and mounting the app into a root div via the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (public, blog, admin, category, and sub-category pages), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied UI with a shield icon, explanatory message, and a home navigation button for users lacking admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: A passthrough wrapper component that renders its children directly without any authentication or authorization guard, leaving permission enforcement to the backend.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sidebar component for blog pages featuring a search input, a filtered list of popular published posts with links, and a static category navigation list.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a comment section for a blog post, displaying existing comments and a form to submit new ones using author name and text fields, with optional pre-loaded comments prop.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a featured blog post as a large card with an overlay image, title, excerpt, metadata, and a link to the full article.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, social media links, and navigation columns for Quick Links, Categories, and Legal pages.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation and Footer components in a full-height flex layout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile menus, a categories dropdown, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a compact blog post card with thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, metadata, and a 'Read More' link.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input with clear button and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarded via ref.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown list of search results with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) that navigates to the selected result's path on selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations (blog posts, comments, images) including reads and mutations like create, update, delete, and publish.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Hook that provides client-side search over a static list of Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering by title, category, and keywords based on a user-supplied query string.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with OKLCH-based design tokens for light/dark themes, and defines reusable component classes for the AyurGlow brand.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page component displaying AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and core values with a hero section, two-column layout, and value cards.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that lists all blog posts with options to create, delete, and toggle publish state, requiring Internet Identity authentication for admin actions.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts as cards with featured images, metadata, and a sidebar, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post that renders content (with inline image marker replacement), metadata, tags, featured image, and a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating a new blog post, supporting title, slug, category, content, tags, featured image upload, inline image insertion, and optional immediate publishing.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating all fields (including featured and inline images) from the fetched post and submitting updates via the updatePost mutation.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: Detail page listing four Ayurvedic dandruff and scalp care remedies, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency, rendered as cards under a hero section.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: Detail page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies for preventing and reversing premature grey hair, each card showing ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: Detail page showcasing four Ayurvedic hair fall treatment remedies with ingredients, step-by-step application, benefits, and recommended frequency, displayed as styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: Detail page featuring four Ayurvedic hair growth remedies (oil blends, masks, protein treatments) with full ingredient lists, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: Displays a hair care page featuring five Ayurvedic oil treatments and hair masks (e.g., Hot Oil Treatment, Brahmi-Amla Oil, Banana-Avocado Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero section with a back link to the Hair Care section.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Static category landing page for Hair Care that displays a hero section and a grid of subcategory links (hair fall, growth, dandruff, grey hair, oils & masks).
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Renders a health remedies page with four natural remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management (Fenugreek Water, Bitter Gourd Juice, Cinnamon-Honey Tonic, Garlic-Lemon). Displays ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency with a medical disclaimer.

A styled card-based page for diabetes and blood pressure support remedies (Fenugreek Seeds, Karela Juice, Cinnamon Tea, Garlic-Ginger) with a hero section, medical alert notice, and back navigation to Health Remedies.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Presents four Ayurvedic digestion and gut health remedies (Triphala Churna, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, Ajwain Water, Buttermilk with Cumin) in a card layout with preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.

Displays a digestive health remedies page with four Ayurvedic treatments (Triphala Powder, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, CCF Tea, Ajwain Water) showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a simple card layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Alternative immunity-boosting remedies page using shadcn Card components, featuring a hero section with a back-navigation link and four similar Ayurvedic remedies with structured preparation and benefits lists.

Displays four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (Turmeric Golden Milk, Tulsi-Ginger Tea, Chyawanprash Tonic, Amla-Honey Shot) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Displays four Ayurvedic stress-relief and sleep remedies (Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, Almond-Saffron Milk) with ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.

Alternative stress and sleep solutions page using shadcn Card components, featuring a hero section with back-navigation and four Ayurvedic remedies including Ashwagandha Moon Milk and Brahmi Tea with benefits and usage instructions.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Displays four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul Formula, Ginger-Green Tea, Cabbage-Carrot Detox Juice) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies category page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic subcategory cards (Immunity, Digestion, Weight Management, Diabetes & BP, Stress & Sleep) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the site's home page with a hero banner, category cards (Health Remedies, Skin Care, Hair Care), benefits section, stats, and a latest blog posts preview fetched via the useGetPublishedPosts hook.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Da: Displays a page of Ayurvedic daily routine practices (Dinacharya, Abhyanga, Evening Wind-Down) with step-by-step instructions, benefits, frequency, and duration for each. Includes a hero section and links back to the Lifestyle & Wellness section.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Mo: Renders a page detailing Ayurvedic morning rituals (oil pulling, tongue scraping, warm lemon water, self-oil massage) with steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero banner and navigation back to Lifestyle & Wellness.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Yo: Presents a page covering yoga and meditation practices (Pranayama, Sun Salutation, Mindfulness Meditation, Yoga Nidra) with detailed steps, benefits, and session duration. Features a gradient hero section and back-navigation link.
frontend/src/pages/LifestyleWellnessPage: Displays the Lifestyle & Wellness category page with a hero section, three subcategory cards (Morning Rituals, Yoga & Meditation, Daily Routines), and an informational blurb about Ayurvedic Dinacharya.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page with styled cards covering introduction, automatically collected information, and user-provided data sections, along with a back-to-home link.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Displays an Ayurvedic skin-care page for acne and pimples with four remedies (Neem-Turmeric pack, Tea Tree spot treatment, Sandalwood-Rose Water paste, Aloe Vera-Lemon gel), each listing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero section and a back link to Skin Care.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Renders an acne treatment page with four Ayurvedic remedies (Neem-Turmeric paste, Tea Tree-Aloe spot treatment, Sandalwood-Rosewater pack, Cinnamon-Honey mask), showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Displays a page of Ayurvedic anti-aging remedies (serums, masks, tonics) with ingredients, step-by-step application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency for each remedy.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Renders a collection of five DIY face pack recipes targeting different skin types, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Presents four Ayurvedic natural glow remedies (masks, toners) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency to achieve radiant skin.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: A styled page with a hero section and card-based layout listing four natural remedies for fading pigmentation and dark spots, including ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
Displays four Ayurvedic pigmentation-reduction remedies with ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and a sun-protection warning notice.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care category page with a hero section and a grid of five subcategory cards (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) linking to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Renders the Terms of Service page with a medical disclaimer alert and styled cards covering agreement terms and website usage policy, including a back-to-home link.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Fat: Displays a page of Ayurvedic fat-burning drink remedies (e.g., lemon-honey water, green tea, ACV drink, jeera water), each with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, frequency, and duration.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Met: Displays a page of Ayurvedic metabolism-boosting remedies (e.g., Triphala-Guggul blend, turmeric tonic, ginger-cumin-fennel tea), each with ingredients, steps, benefits, and usage guidance.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Wei: Displays a page of Ayurvedic weight-loss recipes (e.g., moong dal soup, cabbage-carrot juice, oats-chia breakfast), each with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and frequency recommendations.
Landing page for the Weight Management category displaying a hero section and three subcategory cards (Fat Burning Drinks, Metabolism Boosters, Healthy Weight Loss Recipes) with links to their respective routes.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Provides utility functions for converting ExternalBlob objects to display URLs and replacing inline image markers (e.g., `{{inline-image:N}}`) in HTML content with actual `` tags using blob URLs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with optional sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), extended border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the AyurGlow app.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the AyurGlow Secrets blog management web app, including existing features (inline image insertion, auth removal, bug fix for missing post) and pending new feature requests. Records known issues, architectural notes, and project metadata at schema version 1.0.0.
